# Athenaeum Academy
> Pakistan's leading online academy for O Levels, A Levels, Matric, Intermediate, MDCAT and ECAT. Based in Lahore, Pakistan.

## What We Offer
- O Level courses: Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, English
- A Level courses: all major subjects
- Matric Science: 9th and 10th grade
- FSc/Intermediate: 11th and 12th grade
- MDCAT preparation
- ECAT preparation
- Live online classes with expert Pakistani teachers
- Free trial for all courses
- Parent dashboard for progress tracking
- Ustad AI: Gemini-powered personal tutor

## Contact
Email: support@athenaeumacademy.com
WhatsApp: +92 328 6715408
Location: Lahore, Pakistan
